overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character walking along a narrow coastal path between a steep rock cliff and calm ocean waters. The character moves from a shaded section beneath the cliff overhang into a brighter, more open area with coastal vegetation before approaching a darker rocky passage ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded coastal path beneath cliff overhang

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow path between the cliff face and ocean water

entered.detail: steep dark rock face forming a wall along the left side of the path
calm blue ocean extending to the horizon
sparse tree branches extending from the cliff top overhead
dark dirt trail squeezed between cliff and water

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path between a steep dark cliff on the left and calm ocean waters on the right. The area is shaded by the cliff overhang with sparse tree branches visible overhead, creating an enclosed coastal corridor atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal trail with ocean vista

events.description: emerges from cliff shadow into bright direct sunlight as the path opens to the sky
approaching dark rocky overhang or cave entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the coast through more vegetated terrain toward the darker section ahead

entered.detail: thick bushes and tall grasses growing along the cliff base
landmasses visible on the horizon across the water

segments.scene_description: The path opens up to reveal expansive ocean views with distant islands visible under a partly cloudy sky. The character walks through denser coastal vegetation before approaching a darker rocky overhang or cave entrance at the end of the visible path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal trail that transitions from a shaded cliffside corridor into a bright, open vista. It begins with the character walking a narrow dirt path tucked between a steep dark cliff and calm ocean waters, where sparse overhead branches create an enclosed atmosphere. As the path opens up, the scene expands to reveal expansive ocean views and distant islands under a partly cloudy sky. The camera then follows the character through denser coastal vegetation before finally turning toward a dark rocky overhang that looms at the end of the trail.
